title: Service Fee v2
description: Defines the fee structure for an administrative procedure. Embedded in the root AdministrativeProcedure record. Merges cost and pricing into a single model with explicit rules and a computed summary.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of the fee schema used to produce this object (e.g. '2.0.0').

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this fee object was generated or last normalized.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary values in this record. Currently constrained to MGA (Malagasy Ariary).

model.description: High-level classification of the fee structure. 'fixed': single flat amount. 'conditional': amount depends on applicant or request attributes. 'range': amount falls within a defined min-max band. 'composite': multiple fee components that sum together. 'percentage': amount is a percentage of a base value. 'unknown': fee information could not be reliably extracted — triggers BR-010 warning if a payment step exists.

rules.description: List of fee rules that together define the full pricing logic. MUST contain exactly fee.summary.ruleCount entries (BR-005). An empty array is valid for free procedures (model should be 'fixed', amount 0).

items.description: A single fee rule. The required fields beyond ruleId and type depend on the rule type: 'fixed' requires amount, 'range' requires minAmount and maxAmount, 'percentage' requires percentage.

ruleId.description: Stable unique identifier for this fee rule within the procedure. Pattern: rule_ followed by alphanumerics, hyphens, or underscores (e.g. 'rule_fixed_base', 'rule_range_enterprise').

type.description: Rule type. 'fixed': flat amount defined by amount field. 'range': bounded amount defined by minAmount and maxAmount. 'percentage': proportion defined by percentage field. 'component': named part of a composite fee, defined by componentLabel and amount. 'unknown': could not be classified.

amount.description: Flat fee amount in the procedure's currency. Required when type is 'fixed' or 'component'. Must be >= 0 (BR-006).

minAmount.description: Lower bound of the fee range. Required when type is 'range'. Must be <= maxAmount (BR-007). Must be >= 0 (BR-006).

maxAmount.description: Upper bound of the fee range. Required when type is 'range'. Must be >= minAmount (BR-007). Must be >= 0 (BR-006).

percentage.description: Fee as a percentage of a base value (0–100). Required when type is 'percentage'. The base value is described in the condition or appliesTo field.

condition.description: Free-text description of the condition under which this rule applies (e.g. 'Pour les entreprises de plus de 10 salariés'). Used for conditional rules.

appliesTo.description: Free-text description of what the fee applies to (e.g. 'Valeur déclarée du bien', 'Capital social'). Used for percentage rules to describe the base.

componentLabel.description: Human-readable name of this fee component. Used when type is 'component' within a composite fee (e.g. 'Frais de dossier', 'Taxe de timbre').

confidence.description: Normalization confidence for this rule's data. 'high': extracted reliably. 'medium': extracted with some uncertainty. 'low': extracted with significant uncertainty — manual review recommended.

sourceText.description: Original text from the source document that this rule was extracted from. Preserved for traceability.

summary.description: Precomputed summary of the fee structure for fast display and filtering. MUST be consistent with the rules array: ruleCount MUST equal len(rules) (BR-005), and monetary bounds MUST respect BR-006 and BR-007.

isConditional.description: True if the applicable fee amount depends on applicant or request attributes. Derived from the presence of conditional rules.

minAmount.description: Minimum possible fee amount across all rules, in MGA. Null if not determinable (e.g. model is 'unknown' or 'percentage'). Must be <= maxAmount when both are present (BR-007).

maxAmount.description: Maximum possible fee amount across all rules, in MGA. Null if not determinable. Must be >= minAmount when both are present (BR-007).

defaultAmount.description: The most common or baseline fee amount for display purposes, in MGA. For fixed fees: equals amount. For conditional fees: the amount that applies to the most common case. Null if not determinable.

ruleCount.description: Number of rules in the rules array. MUST equal len(rules) exactly (BR-005). Used to detect summary/rules inconsistency.

source.description: Provenance metadata identifying the source text and parser that produced this fee object.

rawText.description: Original fee text as extracted verbatim from the source document (e.g. 'Droits de timbre: 2000 Ar + frais de dossier: 500 Ar').

rawValues.description: List of raw numeric or string values extracted from the source before normalization (e.g. [2000, 500, 'gratuit']).

sourceFile.description: Filename or path of the source document.

sourceRowId.description: Row or record identifier within the source file.

parserVersion.description: Version of the normalization parser that produced this object.
